## Source Provenance

- Sanskrit transcription inspected from the Internet Sacred Text Archive Unicode Rig Veda pages.
- English translation inspected from the Ralph T. H. Griffith public-domain translation pages in the same archive.

metadata.title: Rig Veda - Mandala 1 Hymn 1
